title: Mitti
desc: Deva, a villager, goes on a violent rampage to avenge his sister's rape, and soon finds himself battling both the criminals responsible and the police.

title: Shamitabh
desc: An aspiring actor with the inability to speak, joins forces with a man who has a powerful voice. Together they take the film industry by storm, but will their egos get in the way?

title: Anjaana Anjaaani
desc: The film of two strangers, who meet on a bridge intending to commit suicide. After bonding over their shared miseries,they make a pact to live life to the fullest for the next 20 days and explore various adventures together. As they embark on this trip, they begin to develop feelings for each other, leading to a complex and emotional journey. Will they embrace their new-found love or stick to their original plan?

title: Emi Liya Hai To Chukana Padega
desc: A film that tells the story of a group of people who fall prey to credit card debt and are struggling to repay their loans. They come together to form a support group and devise a plan to fight against the corrupt practices of the credit card companies. The movie highlights the consequences of reckless spending and the importance of financial literacy in an engaging and thought-provoking plot.

title: Freaky Ali
desc: After a chance encounter with a golfer inspires him, Ali, a debt collector working for a gangster, pursues the sport professionally. Soon, he becomes a champion, but he must face a corrupt rival.
